name: cockpit
description: Per-project local web cockpit for Claude Code and Codex: goal capture, decision log, live transcript, and needs-your-call bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Goal + decision cockpit for Claude Code and Codex.
interface.longDescription: A local dashboard and skill for setting a session goal, logging decisions that diffs cannot explain, streaming the live transcript, and handing needs_your_call choices back to the user.
defaultPrompt: Start a cockpit session for this project.
